sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 몬스터 베버리지, 2025년 4분기 매출 21억 3,000만 달러로 전년 대비 17.6% 성장하며 견조한 실적 달성

keyPoints.text: 2025년 4분기 순매출은 21억 3,000만 달러를 기록하며 전년 동기 대비 17.6% 증가했습니다.
주력 부문인 몬스터 에너지 드링크 매출이 19억 9,000만 달러로 18.9% 성장하며 전체 실적을 견인했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 몬스터 에너지 드링크 부문은 18.9% 성장했고, 전략 브랜드 부문은 7.8% 성장한 1억 1,000만 달러의 매출을 기록했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 몬스터 에너지 드링크 부문 매출은 19억 9,000만 달러로 전년 동기 16억 7,000만 달러 대비 상승했습니다.
전략 브랜드 부문 매출은 1억 1,000만 달러로 전년 동기 1억 200만 달러 대비 7.8% 증가했습니다.

watchItems.text: 환율 변동이 향후 분기별 매출 성장률에 미치는 영향과 비GAAP 기준 조정 실적의 지속 가능성을 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

Pondel / Judy Lin PondelWilkinson Inc. (310) 279-5980 MONSTER BEVERAGE REPORTS 2025 FOURTH QUARTER AND FULL-YEAR FINANCIAL RESULTS 2025 Fourth Quarter Highlights · Net Sales rise 17.6 percent to $2.13 billion · Operating Income increases 42.3 percent to $542.6 million (16.0 percent to $61  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.13 billion = 21억 3,000만 달러; $542.6 million = 5억 4,260만 달러; $617.6 million = 6억 1,760만 달러; $449.2 million = 4억 4,920만 달러; $507.0 million = 5억 700만 달러; $2.13 = 2.13달러; $542.6 = 542.6달러; $617.6 = 617.6달러; $507.0 = 507.0달러; 16.0 percent = 16.0%; 42.3 percent = 42.3%; 65.9 percent = 65.9%; 31.2 percent = 31.2%; 64.9 percent = 64.9%; 30.4 percent = 30.4%.

sted basis) 1 The tables at the end of this press release provide a reconciliation of non-GAAP financial measures to the Company’s results, as reported under GAAP. (See “Reconciliation of GAAP and Non-GAAP Information” below). Corona, CA – February 26, 2026 – Monster Beverage Corporation (NASDAQ: MNST) today reported financial results for the three- and twelve-months ended December 31, 2025. Net sales for the 2025 fourth quarter increased 17.6 percent to $2.13 billion, from $1.81 billion in the same period last year. Net changes in foreign currency exchange rates had a favorable impact on net sales for the 2025 fourth quarter of $27.7 million. Net sales on a foreign currency adjusted basis (non-GAAP) increased 16.1 percent in the 2025 fourth quarter. Net sal  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.13 billion = 21억 3,000만 달러; $1.81 billion = 18억 1,000만 달러; $27.7 million = 2,770만 달러; $2.13 = 2.13달러; $1.81 = 1.81달러; $27.7 = 27.7달러; 17.6 percent = 17.6%; 16.1 percent = 16.1%; 18.3 percent = 18.3%.

ohol Brands segment, on a foreign currency adjusted basis (non-GAAP), increased 16.7 percent in the 2025 fourth quarter. Net sales for the Company’s Monster Energy® Drinks segment, which primarily includes the Company’s Monster Energy® drinks, Reign Total Body Fuel® high performance energy drinks, Reign Storm® total wellness energy drinks and Bang Energy® drinks, increased 18.9 percent to $1.99 billion for the 2025 fourth quarter, from $1.67 billion for the 2024 fourth quarter. Net changes in foreign currency exchange rates had a favorable impact on net sales for the Monster Energy® Drinks segment of approximately $24.4 million for the 2025 fourth quarter. Net sales on a foreign currency adjusted basis (non-GAAP) for the Monster Energy® Drinks segment increa  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.99 billion = 19억 9,000만 달러; $1.67 billion = 16억 7,000만 달러; $24.4 million = 2,440만 달러; $1.99 = 1.99달러; $1.67 = 1.67달러; $24.4 = 24.4달러; 16.7 percent = 16.7%; 18.9 percent = 18.9%; 17.5 percent = 17.5%.

segment, which primarily includes the various energy drink brands acquired from The Coca-Cola Company, as well as the Company’s affordable energy brands, Predator® and Fury®, increased 7.8 percent to $110.0 million for the 2025 fourth quarter, from $102.0 million in the 2024 fourth quarter. Net changes in foreign currency exchange rates had a favorable impact on net sales for the Strategic Brands segment of approximately $3.2 million for the 2025 fourth quarter. Net sales on a foreign currency adjusted basis (non-GAAP) for the Strategic Brands segment increased 4.7 percent in the 2025 fourth quarter.
